jobs.name: 0buck-progress-checker
jobs.description: Check 0buck project progress and notify the user.

payload.message: Check the current task_list and group chat history for the 0buck project. If there are new completions or significant updates from team members (Shopify-专家, 程序猿, ai-architect, 电商策划, 运营 社交) since the last user interaction, provide a concise progress summary and notification to the user.
